changes.description: GT3 Mk1 production count in notes prose — exact figure replaces approximation
changes.notes: Three independent sources give exact figure 1,868. No source disagrees.

changes.description: GT3 Mk1 variant production field — exact figure replaces tilde approximation
changes.notes: US figure (0) unchanged — GT3 Mk1 was never federalized, confirmed by all sources.

changes.description: GT2 combined production count in notes prose
changes.notes: Two sources agree on exact 1,287 total (963 Mk1 + 324 Mk2). Tilde kept on 'approximately' in prose because Mk1/Mk2 split rounds.

changes.description: GT2 Mk1 worldwide production — exact figure replaces tilde approximation
changes.notes: Worldwide exact figure 963 confirmed by 2 sources. US figure ~245 kept with tilde — sole reference is indirect forum data (total 996 GT2 US was 317 across both Mk1/Mk2); Mk1-only US split unverifiable from available sources.

changes.description: GT2 Mk2 worldwide production — exact figure replaces tilde approximation
changes.notes: Exact 324 confirmed by 2 sources. Consistent with total GT2 1,287 = 963 + 324.

changes.description: GT3 Mk2 worldwide production — prior figure missed MY2005 production of ~276 units
changes.notes: Prior figure ~2,310 traced to Porsche Knowledge, which appears to have omitted MY2005 production (276 units). Three other sources confirm 2,589 worldwide (excludes GT3 RS which is a distinct variant at 682 units). US figure updated from ~1,010 to ~960 per forum year-by-year compilation (257+607+96=960); tilde retained as this is one source.
